generic_findings: C3 treatment routing was reliable and used fewer tokens and lower estimated cost than control.
Required-surface coverage showed a ceiling effect in both conditions, so no treatment lift was established.
The justified improvement target is visible impact closure, evidence provenance, and unresolved uncertainty rather than domain knowledge.

development_changes.change: Reverse traversal includes parent-owned children as destruction-impact adjacency and excludes the containment parent unless an inbound wiring edge exists.
Impact assessment uses three bounded routes, one closure row per surfaced lane, exact evidence, affected/unaffected/unknown status, isolation boundaries, and explicit next checks.

sol_challenger_final_verdict.note: The initial lane-closure drift finding was repaired before freeze.

conditions: Externally preregister cases, metrics, judges, per-call budgets, and stopping rules before inference.
Measure required-surface lift and blocking false claims from independent semantic judgments.
Do not count this development freeze as evidence that the 20 percent objective was reached.
